_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Choose the number of states to include in the randomizer. 2-3 recommended for syncs

number_of_stamps_available.description: Number of National Park Stamps available in the randomizer

percent_stamps_required.description: Percent of National Park Stamps required to complete the passport

description: Preference setting for Arizona. Choose a weighting between 0 and 100
0 will always exclude the state from being picked
If there are more '100' states than the number_of_states option, randomly choose between them with equal weighting

own_colorado.description: Do you own the Colorado DLC?
